connectingEntrepreneursAndInvestors: The marketplace where entrepreneurs publish their projects and investors discover the next opportunity.
featurePublishDesc: Entrepreneurs list their projects on a curated marketplace and put them in front of serious investors.
featureDiscoverDesc: Investors browse and filter projects by sector, stage and value to find the ones that fit their thesis.
featureConnectDesc: Investors and entrepreneurs exchange information to gauge fit before taking the conversation further.
featureUnlockDesc: Pay to reveal complete project details and the owner's contact, then negotiate the deal off-platform on your own terms.
featureSecureDesc: Every project and investor is reviewed, so you operate in a transparent, trustworthy environment.
entrepreneurDesc: Publish your project, reach qualified investors, and exchange information to move toward a deal.
investorDesc: Discover curated projects, unlock detailed information, and connect directly with founders to negotiate.
legalDisclaimer: The material presented via this website is for informational purposes only. Nothing in this website constitutes a solicitation for the purchase or sale of any financial product or service. Material presented on this website does not constitute a public offering of securities or investment management services in any jurisdiction. Investing in startup and early stage companies involves risks, including loss of capital, illiquidity, lack of dividends and dilution, and it should be done only as part of a diversified portfolio. The Investments presented in this website are suitable only for investors who are sufficiently sophisticated to understand these risks and make their own investment decisions.
adminSupportSelectConversation: Select a conversation to reply as Support.
adminModSelectConversation: Select a conversation to view its messages.
adminDashboardSubtitle: Overview of users, conversations and support.
adminDashboardNoThreadsWaiting: No conversations waiting for a reply.
adminDashboardModerationDesc: Review conversations, delete messages and manage banned words.
adminSupportPageSubtitle: Messages users sent to Im-Vestor Support. Replies are sent as Support.

authSignInDescription: Sign in to continue to Im-Vestor Leads.
authJoinDescription: Join Im-Vestor Leads as an entrepreneur or investor.

dashNoCredits: No lead credits — buy more in the shop
dashInvestorsSubtitle: Connect with investors who match your project
msgSelectConversation: Select a conversation to start messaging.
msgNoConversations: No conversations yet. Start one from a profile page.
profPageDescription: Manage your account details. Investor fields appear when you select the Investor role.
profWalletDescription: Pokes, lead credits and your membership.
profAccountTypeHint: Set at sign-up — can't be changed.
projBasicsDesc: What the project is and where it operates.
projOneLinePitchPlaceholder: What problem do you solve, in one sentence?
projAboutPlaceholder: Tell investors about the product, market and team.
projInvestmentDesc: The numbers investors will filter and evaluate by.
projErrName: Name must be at least 2 characters
projErrInvestmentGoal: Enter an investment goal greater than 0
errImageType: Image must be JPEG, PNG or WebP
errVideoType: Video must be MP4, WebM or QuickTime
projVideoHint: MP4, WebM or MOV · up to 50 MB
projDeleteConfirm: Delete this project? This cannot be undone.
projMyProjectsDesc: Create and manage the projects investors will discover.
projNewProjectDesc: Fill in the basics — you can publish it when it's ready.
projNoProjectsDesc: Create your first project to start attracting investors.
projLeadsDesc: Browse other users on the platform and start a conversation.
shopHeaderSubtitle: Buy pokes, unlock leads, or upgrade your membership.
shopToastPaymentConfirmed: Payment confirmed — your balance is updated.
shopToastPaymentFailed: Payment didn't go through. You weren't charged.
shopToastConfirmError: Couldn't confirm your purchase — contact support if charged.
shopToastPaymentReceived: Payment received — updating your balance, refresh in a moment.
shopSectionMembershipsDescription: Browse without limits, reach every opportunity and get dedicated support. The annual plan includes two months free.
shopSectionPokesDescription: Send introduction pokes to other members. Pick the amount that fits your pace.
shopSectionLeadsDescription: Get the complete profile, media and a direct chat with the founder. Access is permanent.
shopDialogRevertDesc: You already received this plan's pokes this billing cycle, so there's no charge and no new pokes now.
shopDialogUpgradeDesc: You'll be charged only the prorated difference now, using the payment method from your current plan.
shopDialogDowngradeDesc: This takes effect on your next billing cycle — no charge now, and you keep your current plan until then.
shopDialogRevertBalance: Balance: full pokes resume at your next renewal — nothing added now.
shopDialogDowngradeBalance: Your pokes: we won't remove any you've already received.
shopDialogPaymentMethod: Payment method: change it anytime via Manage billing.

errCouldNotChangePlan: Could not change your plan. Try again.
shopSectionHypertrainDescription: Put a project or your investor profile in the dashboard spotlight carousel for 7 days.
